# Sudoku Fast
> Real-time competitive Sudoku built for speed. Designed for fast one-handed play on mobile — swipe to fill, long-press to lock, zero unnecessary taps.

## How to play
- Practice mode: solve puzzles solo across 5 difficulties (Easy to Master)
- Compete mode: match against players worldwide or challenge the adaptive CPU
- The CPU learns from real player times and adapts to human skill

## Key features
- One-handed mobile-first controls: swipe, long-press lock, drag-to-fill
- 5 difficulty levels: Easy, Medium, Hard, Expert, Master
- Real-time PvP matchmaking with cross-difficulty fallback
- Adaptive AI opponent trained on actual player completion times
- Pencil marks (notes), undo, eraser
- Completion wave animation and freeze penalty on errors
- Cross-difficulty matching so you never wait long for a game

## Tech
- Node.js + Express + Socket.IO backend
- React + Vite frontend
- No database — all state persisted to JSON
- Deployed on Render
